revision.comment:
Created page with "{{infobox | bodyclass = vcard | child = {{#ifeq:{{{embed|}}}|yes|yes}} | title = {{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}} | titleclass = fn org | subheader = {{#if:{{{native_name|}}}|
{{{native_name}}}
}} | headerstyle = background-color: #eee; | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|rank=best|P18 | maxva..."
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
